TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Blangaw ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 114 buwan, 300 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 286 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 14 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 93%, saySiyat 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. qalang Blangaw ga ungat pqwasan biru. qalang Blangaw ga maki 1 kyokay. qalang Blangaw ga maki 1 hasisyo. qalang Blangaw ga ungat ngasal sexu. qalang Blangaw ga ungat khu skwan biru. qalang Blangaw ga ungat ngasal pkita nbu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Blangaw hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Blangaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Blangaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Blangaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Blangaw hya' ga Heku'. tay 'llaw na Blangaw hya' ga Si'ung. rekisi tuqi qsya' ki rrhzyal 'bagan tngan kwara' qu rgyax ga, mtasiq kwara' qu abaw nya'. blaq balay ngayan. kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy Blangaw pqwasan 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san "Syan taw 122 haw" basu "5630A basu'" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βlaŋaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. qalaŋ βlaŋaw ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. qalaŋ βlaŋaw ɣa maki * kjokaj. qalaŋ βlaŋaw ɣa maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. qalaŋ βlaŋaw ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal s~ɕexu. qalaŋ βlaŋaw ɣa uŋat kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. qalaŋ βlaŋaw ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal pkita nβu. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βlaŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na βlaŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βlaŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βlaŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βlaŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa ħekuʔ. taj ʔllaw na βlaŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕiʔuŋ. rekis~ɕi tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ ki rrħzjal ʔβaɣan tŋan kwaraʔ qu rɣjax ɣa, mtas~ɕiq kwaraʔ qu aβaw njaʔ. βlaq βalaj ŋajan. kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj βlaŋaw pqwas~ɕan ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan "s~ɕjan taw *** ħaw" βas~ɕu "****a βas~ɕuʔ" qu s~ɕpzjaŋ ɣlɣaŋ nħa qalaŋ mus~ɕaʔ ana inuʔ. kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Blangaw ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 114 buwan, 300 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 286 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 14 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 93%, saySiyat 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. qalang Blangaw ga ungat pqwasan biru. qalang Blangaw ga maki 1 kyokay. qalang Blangaw ga maki 1 hasisyo. qalang Blangaw ga ungat ngasal sexu. qalang Blangaw ga ungat khu skwan biru. qalang Blangaw ga ungat ngasal pkita nbu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Blangaw hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Blangaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Blangaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Blangaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Blangaw hya' ga Heku'. tay 'llaw na Blangaw hya' ga Si'ung. rekisi tuqi qsya' ki rrhzyal 'bagan tngan kwara' qu rgyax ga, mtasiq kwara' qu abaw nya'. blaq balay ngayan. kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy Blangaw pqwasan 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san "Syan taw 122 haw" basu "5630A basu'" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βlaŋaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. qalaŋ βlaŋaw ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. qalaŋ βlaŋaw ɣa maki * kjokaj. qalaŋ βlaŋaw ɣa maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. qalaŋ βlaŋaw ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal s~ɕexu. qalaŋ βlaŋaw ɣa uŋat kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. qalaŋ βlaŋaw ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal pkita nβu. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βlaŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na βlaŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βlaŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βlaŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βlaŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa ħekuʔ. taj ʔllaw na βlaŋaw ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕiʔuŋ. rekis~ɕi tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ ki rrħzjal ʔβaɣan tŋan kwaraʔ qu rɣjax ɣa, mtas~ɕiq kwaraʔ qu aβaw njaʔ. βlaq βalaj ŋajan. kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj βlaŋaw pqwas~ɕan ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan "s~ɕjan taw *** ħaw" βas~ɕu "****a βas~ɕuʔ" qu s~ɕpzjaŋ ɣlɣaŋ nħa qalaŋ mus~ɕaʔ ana inuʔ. kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
